title: DDR
name: DDR
summary:
The DDR series — three releases spanning Colin's alphabets era into killd by:
DDR (2011, alphabets), DDR2/HAUNTED (2012, alphabets), DDR3:Loaner phone
(2016, killd by). Each iteration revisits the motif with new textures; the
series crosses the project transition from alphabets to killd by.
body:
# DDR

A cross-project series that Colin returned to three times over five years. The
first DDR (2011) appeared in the alphabets catalog as a compact meditation on
chiptune-adjacent dance textures. DDR2/HAUNTED (2012) extended the motif into
noisier territory. DDR3:Loaner phone (2016) landed on the killd by Bandcamp,
carrying the naming forward into his mature-era project.

Seeded 2026-04-20 as the first vault `series` entry — proves that cross-project
groupings are a real shape in the archive.
